qa_pairs.question: After creating a shared collection in Globus, how do you add other people or groups to access it?
qa_pairs.answer: Once a shared collection is created, you can add people or groups to it by clicking on the "Add Permissions -- Share With" button in the access list.

qa_pairs.question: What is the initial state of the access list when a new Globus shared collection is created?
qa_pairs.answer: When a new Globus shared collection is created, the current access list will initially show only your account.
